results.description: Baseline — original verbose SKILL.md (identical to source)
Compressed skill — removed USGS data section, aggregation examples, and verbose explanations; kept only classification logic, LP3 formulas, and critical rules

changes: Removed USGS Streamflow Data section (unnecessary background)
Removed NWS flood stage table (model already knows these)
Removed complete LP3 example (redundant with step-by-step)
Consolidated Common Pitfalls into Critical Rules section
Reduced skill from 136 lines to 42 lines
